content:
MODULE: cosmos.network.cosmos_latent_router
FILE: cosmos/network/cosmos_latent_router.py (446 lines)
CATEGORY: network

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS Latent Space Router
===========================

Semantic routing at the protocol layer — the mesh UNDERSTANDS what it routes.

Instead of routing by model name (--bot phi4), routes by intent:
  1. Embed the incoming query using sentence-transformers
  2. Compare against model profile vectors

CLASSES:
- ModelProfile: A model's strength profile in latent space.
  Methods: def vector(self) -> List[float]
- RouteDecision: Result of a latent routing decision.
- LatentRouter: Semantic routing engine for the COSMOS mesh.

Routes queries to the best model b
  Methods: def add_model(self, bot_name: str, strengths: Optional[Dict[str, float]]=None)
  Methods: def route(self, prompt: str, available_bots: Optional[List[str]]=None) -> RouteDecision
  Methods: def update_model_quality(self, bot_name: str, quality: float, latency_ms: float)
  Methods: def record_outcome(self, decision: RouteDecision, quality: float, latency_ms: float=0) -> None
  Methods: def get_route_stats(self) -> Dict
  Methods: def get_routing_stats(self) -> Dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def cosine_similarity(a: List[float], b: List[float]) -> float

INTERNAL DEPS: cosmos_auth
